headline: Options Action: A stable, cash-generating stock to counter the volatility
summary: Volatility surge has Mike Khouw looking for some steady income.

headline: Mizuho Sees Improved Regulatory Stability, Raises Cigna (CI) Price Objective
summary: With a TTM operating cash flow of $8.81 billion, The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) is included among the 12 Cash-Rich Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 8, Mizuho raised the firm’s price recommendation on The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) to $340 from $330. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. Analyst Ann Hynes said Mizuho believes […]
